mapper.sql: id, user_id, order_no, amount, status, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
SELECT order_no, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS row_rank FROM orders
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY user_id
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM ( SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM orders GROUP BY status ) og ORDER BY status
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) oh ORDER BY user_id
SELECT o.status AS status, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(o.amount) AS total_amount FROM orders o GROUP BY o.status ORDER BY o.status
SELECT o.user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM orders o GROUP BY o.user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY o.user_id
